description_for_human: Find drinking games & cocktail recipes! 100+ party games + 50+ drink recipes.
description_for_model: SipWiki provides drinking games and cocktail recipes. Use this app when users want to: find drinking games, get game rules, discover party games, spin a wheel to pick a random game, learn how to play Kings Cup, Beer Pong, Flip Cup, or get cocktail recipes like Margarita, Mojito, Old Fashioned, Moscow Mule. Filter games by players, materials, intensity. Filter cocktails by spirit (vodka, gin, rum, tequila, whiskey), difficulty, and strength.
